command_display: lms chat google/gemma-4-e2b --system-prompt You generate one static product UI candidate for a JudgmentKit comparison fixture. Return one valid JSON object only. Do not use Markdown fences. Do not include scripts, external assets, remote fonts, or external image URLs. Respect the context boundary described in the user prompt. --prompt <prompt> --ttl 300 --yes
notes: Gemma 4 (local LLM) output captured through lms for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: This surface allows a support manager to review refund escalation cases, assess evidence completeness against policy, and determine the next appropriate action or handoff.

surface.heading: Escalation Case: R-1842 - Nora Diaz

selected.request: Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

evidence: Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
surface.policy: Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.
actions: Return to Support Agent for Evidence
surface.primary_action: Return to Support Agent for Evidence

handoff.title: Gather Missing Receipt
handoff.reason: Required evidence (receipt photo) is missing for manager approval.
handoff.action: Agent must obtain and submit the required receipt photo.
